source.update_note: 2026-27 migratory bird data from CDFW. California has 5 duck zones (Northeastern, SSJV, SoCal, Colorado River, Balance of State) and multiple goose zones.

species.name: Band-tailed Pigeon
species.season_raw: Northern Zone: Sep 19-27; Southern Zone: Sep 26 - Oct 4

species.name: Duck (Northeastern Zone)
species.bag_limit: 7 ducks daily (max 7 mallards ≤2 females, 3 pintail, 2 canvasback, 2 redhead, 2 scaup)

species.name: Duck (Southern Zones)
species.season_raw: SSJV, SoCal, Colorado River, Balance of State: Oct 24 - Jan 31. Scaup: Nov 7 - Jan 31.
species.hunting_units: SSJV, SoCal, Colorado River, Balance of State
species.bag_limit: 7 ducks daily (same species limits as NE zone)

species.name: Coot & Moorhen (Gallinule)
species.season_raw: Concurrent with duck season in each zone

species.name: Goose
species.season_raw: Varies by zone. NE: Oct 3-Jan 10 (Canada), Oct 3-Nov 29 & Jan 1-13 (white/w-front). Balance of State: Oct 24-Jan 31. Late season Feb-Mar.
species.hunting_units: Multiple zones (NE, SSJV, SoCal, Colorado River, Balance of State)
species.bag_limit: 30/day max (20 white geese, 10 dark geese; ≤6 white-fronted, ≤3 large Canada)

species.name: Brant (Black Brant)
species.season_raw: Northern Zone: Nov 29 - Dec 14; Balance of State: Nov 30 - Dec 15

licenses.name: California Duck Validation
licenses.covers: Required for waterfowl hunting (not required for Junior license holders)

licenses.name: HIP Validation
licenses.covers: Required for all migratory bird hunters (free)

key_notes.title: California has 5 duck zones (Northeastern, SSJV, Southern California, Colorado River, Balance of State) with different opening dates. The NE zone opens Oct 3; southern zones open Oct 24.

sources.label: CDFW — Duck Zones
sources.evidence: NE Zone: Oct 3 - Jan 13. SSJV, SoCal, Balance: Oct 24 - Jan 31. Colorado River: Oct 23 - Jan 31.

key_notes.title: The California Duck Validation ($39.96) is required for waterfowl hunting. The Upland Game Bird Validation ($24.84) is separate. HIP validation is free.

sources.label: CDFW — License Fees
sources.evidence: California Duck Validation: $39.96. Upland Game Bird Validation: $24.84. HIP: Free.

key_notes.title: Dove season is split: Sep 1-15 and Nov 14 - Dec 28. Bag limit is 15 daily (max 10 white-winged). Eurasian collared-doves are year-round with no limit.

sources.label: CDFW — Dove Season
sources.evidence: Dove: Sep 1-15 & Nov 14 - Dec 28. 15 daily (10 white-winged max).

key_notes.title: Nonlead ammunition is required for all hunting in California. HIP registration is free and required for all migratory bird hunters.

sources.label: CDFW — Nonlead
sources.evidence: Nonlead ammunition required when taking any wildlife with a firearm anywhere in California.
